goats.title: 🐐 Two Stubborn Little Goats
goats.html:
Once upon a time, there were two little goats. They lived on a big mountain. One goat lived on one side and the other goat lived on the other side.

In the middle of the mountain, there was a river. A very narrow bridge crossed the river. Only one goat could cross the bridge at a time.

One day, both goats wanted to cross the bridge at the same time. They met in the middle. 'Move! I want to cross!' said the first goat. She was very stubborn. 'No! YOU move! I was here first!' said the second goat. He was angry.

The two stubborn goats pushed and pushed. They were both very angry. Neither goat wanted to go back. They pushed harder and harder, and then... SPLASH! Both goats fell into the river!

The goats were wet and cold. They climbed out of the water. 'That was silly,' said the first goat. 'Next time, let's take turns,' said the second goat. And from that day, the goats were never stubborn again!

The lesson of this story is: it is better to be kind than to be stubborn. When two people both want to go first, nobody wins!

sports.title: 🏆 The Best in Sports
sports.html:
Children love playing sports! Some children play football and basketball. Others play tennis, baseball or golf. There are so many fast and exciting sports to try!

In our class, Tom is the tallest boy. He is the best at basketball because he can reach the hoop. Emma is the fastest runner. She always wins the race! She is faster than everyone.

Who is the best at football? Sam is the best! He can kick the ball the farthest. He is the strongest kicker in the team. Lily is the best at tennis. She is the fastest at hitting the ball back.

In golf, you need to be very calm. It is the quietest sport. You have to hit a small ball into a small hole. It is the hardest sport to learn!

In baseball, you need to be the fastest at running to the bases. You also need to throw the ball the farthest. Soccer is the most popular sport in Spain. It is the most exciting to watch!

Every sport is special. The most important thing is to have fun and play together. Being stubborn or angry does not help in sports. The best players are always kind to their team!
